videos.headline: Michigan RB Donovan Edwards finds Colston Loveland for trick-play TD
videos.description: Michigan's trick play works to perfection as RB Donovan Edwards throws a dime to Colston Loveland for a touchdown vs. Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan RB Donovan Edwards finds Colston Loveland for trick-play TD) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nate Carter punches in Michigan State TD
videos.description: Nate Carter powers through to give Michigan State the lead vs. Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nate Carter punches in Michigan State TD) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colston Loveland's toe-tapping TD brings Michigan within 1
videos.description: Colston Loveland makes a nice catch in the end zone to get Michigan back in the game vs. Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colston Loveland's toe-tapping TD brings Michigan within 1) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Fight breaks out at end of Michigan State vs. Michigan
videos.description: Ugly scenes transpire at the end of Michigan State vs. Michigan as players and benches from both teams get into it.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Fight breaks out at end of Michigan State vs. Michigan) 2024/10/26 ESHEET
